testsuite.name: GenerateInvoiceWorker

testcase.name: successful execution should complete with invoice number and timestamp
handles null orderId gracefully by still completing

testsuite.system-out: 13:49:15.580 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=generate-invoice] START orderId=c8bdc882-9e5a-4ea1-8830-19db60d5a759 taskId=null 13:49:15.581 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.GenerateInvoiceWorker -- [GenerateInvoice] Generating invoice INV-1784017155581 for orderId=c8bdc882-9e5a-4ea1-8830-19db60d5a759 customerId=CUST-001 amount=750.0 13:49:15.582 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.GenerateInvoiceWorker -- [GenerateInvoice] Invoice INV-1784017155581 generated at 2026-07-14T08:19:15.582209Z for orderId=c8bdc882-9e5a-4ea1-8830-19db60d5a759 13:49:15.582 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=generate-invoice] COMPLETE orderId=c8bdc882-9e5a-4ea1-8830-19db60d5a759 13:49:15.589 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=generate-invoice] START orderId=null taskId=null 13:49:15.590 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.GenerateInvoiceWorker -- [GenerateInvoice] Generating invoice INV-1784017155590 for orderId=null customerId=null amount=null 13:49:15.590 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.GenerateInvoiceWorker -- [GenerateInvoice] Invoice INV-1784017155590 generated at 2026-07-14T08:19:15.590360Z for orderId=null 13:49:15.590 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.worker.BaseExternalTaskWorker -- [Worker=generate-invoice] COMPLETE orderId=null
